turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello. Mujhe ek haematologist se milna hai. Mere blood reports mein kuch abnormal aaya hai — platelet count related.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Zaroor, yeh important hai. Aapka naam aur number?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Shukriya Swapnil ji. Humare haematologist Dr. Arun Pendse hain. Unka clinic schedule Mangalvaar aur Shukravaar hai. Kaunsa din theek hai?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Shukravaar — kal — agar slot ho toh urgent basis pe.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Kal Shukravaar 11 AM ka slot hai. Aur abnormal reports ke case mein hum ise priority mein mark kar lete hain. Aap apni reports saath laana zaroor.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Haan, sab reports hain mere paas. Book kar dijiye please.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Done! Swapnil Ghate, kal Shukravaar 11 AM, Dr. Arun Pendse. Jaldi se report milegi aapko.
